eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Arizona; at 05:52 PM ON MAR 2, 2026 Effective until 01:52 AM MAR 3, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Mohave County Sheriff's Office. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. The Mohave County Sheriff's Office is looking for a white male, Jerome Leonard Kealty, 79 years-old, 6 foot 0 inches, 185 pounds, with gray hair and hazel eyes. Jerome was last seen wearing dark pants and unknown description of shirt. He was last seen in the area of the 6000 block of Abrigo Drive, in Golden Valley, Arizona, Mohave County on 03/02/2026 at 0900 hours. Jerome was last seen driving a white 2004 Chevrolet Tahoe, with an Arizona license plate E K J 1 5. The vehicle is reported to have duct tape on the rear passenger side of window. Jerome has a medical condition that can cause him to become easily confused. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
